title: Smoky Feta Crumble
description: A simple yet flavorful crumble made with smoky feta cheese and a crunchy topping.
instructions: In a bowl, mix the feta cheese and crumble crackers together until well combined.
Drizzle the olive oil over the mixture and stir until the crackers are evenly coated.
Spoon the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the crackers are golden brown and the feta is slightly melted.
Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
